# CWE-826: Premature Release of Resource During Expected Lifetime (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-826-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: closes the shared pool before a background query finishes.
// Background workers may observe a closed handle and fail unpredictably.
func WarmCache(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	done := make(chan struct{})
	go func() {
		defer close(done)
		_, _ = db.Query("SELECT 1")
	}()
	_ = db.Close()
	<-done
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
